title: Creamy Chicken Bisque
description: Rich and comforting chicken bisque made with silky smooth texture and american flavor.
instructions: Melt 2 tbsp of butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove chicken from saucepan and set aside.
Melt remaining 2 tbsp of butter, then add diced tomatoes and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Pour in chicken broth and bring mixture to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Add heavy cream and stir until combined.
Return chicken to saucepan and cook until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped herbs if desired.
